title: Gillespie SSA For A Tristable Gene Regulatory Network
summary: Implement exact Gillespie stochastic simulation and tau-leaping in NumPy for a three-gene mutual-inhibition chemical kinetics model, then report validation, multistability, bifurcation, and acceleration results.
taskPrompt: You are implementing a NumPy-only stochastic simulation workflow for a three-gene mutual-inhibition regulatory network. Read `input/problem_spec.md`, set up the runtime with `uv sync --frozen --project input/runtime_env`, implement exact SSA for Tier 1 and Tier 2, implement tau-leaping for Tier 3, and write `tier1_results.json`, `tier2_results.json`, `tier3_results.json`, and `gillespie_solver.py` under `output/`. Use `numpy.random.default_rng(seed)`, follow the schemas and parameter grids in the specification, do not use SciPy or dedicated stochastic simulation libraries, do not modify `input/`, and write only under `output/`.
agentMustDo: Read `input/problem_spec.md` for the birth-death validation, three-gene mutual-inhibition model, bifurcation scan, tau-leaping requirements, seeds, event counts, and JSON schemas.
Provision the Python runtime via `uv sync --frozen --project input/runtime_env` and run with the resulting NumPy environment.
Implement exact Gillespie SSA for Tier 1 and Tier 2 using `numpy.random.default_rng(seed)`.
Compute Tier 2 trajectory statistics, basin fractions, ensemble statistics, and 50 lag autocorrelation arrays.
Implement the Tier 3 alpha scan and tau-leaping comparison, enforcing non-negative populations and the specified leap condition.
Write the three result JSON files plus reusable `gillespie_solver.py` under `output/`.

inputFiles.name: Problem specification
inputFiles.description: Full task specification with models, parameters, seeds, required simulations, output schemas, banned libraries, and runtime budget.

inputFiles.name: Runtime manifest
inputFiles.description: Declares the NumPy-only Python runtime the agent installs with uv.

inputFiles.name: Runtime lockfile
inputFiles.description: Reproducible lock companion to the runtime manifest.

referenceFiles.name: Tier 2 results
referenceFiles.description: Three-gene trajectory, ensemble, autocorrelation, and multistability summary.

referenceFiles.name: Tier 3 results
referenceFiles.description: Bifurcation scan and tau-leaping comparison summary.

referenceFiles.name: Solver source
referenceFiles.description: Reusable NumPy implementation used to produce the result files.

evaluation: Hard gates include missing or unparseable required JSON/source files, banned imports, malformed Tier 2 trajectory structure, or malformed Tier 3 grid/comparison structure. The scorer awards continuous credit for source/code structure, Tier 1 validation behavior, Tier 2 reproducibility and schema, and Tier 3 public-contract consistency. Positive fixture score is 1.0 and negative fixture score is 0.0.

classifier.rationale: The task involves implementing a stochastic simulation for a gene regulatory network, which falls under computational chemistry.
